text: It's just interesting to see the four different people they got from different walks of life that they put together to combine in this one mission. Instead of just people that have trained together for years and years and years through the military to become astronauts, this is amazing. It's just incredible what the mission in mind is to help people, and not just nobody's going up there to show off. It's actually for a purpose, a wise purpose, and that is to improve people's health. and The money raised also contributes to helping people's health be restored and the cure of cancer, etc. I'm a cancer survivor, and so it's it's an amazing thing to be able to explore and find new cures for illnesses.
